functional_result: 0% residual phenylalanine hydroxylase activity
explanation_de: Gut charakterisierte pathogene Variante. R408W ist die haeufigste PKU-Variante in Nordeuropa. Keine Restaktivitaet des Enzyms, zahlreiche funktionelle Studien, ClinVar-Konsens pathogen.
explanation_en: Well-characterized pathogenic variant. R408W is the most common PKU variant in Northern Europe. No residual enzyme activity, numerous functional studies, ClinVar consensus pathogenic.

functional_result: Defective CFTR protein folding and trafficking, <5% chloride channel function
explanation_de: Die haeufigste CF-Variante weltweit (~70% der CF-Allele). MAF 1.2% passt zu AR-Erkrankung mit Carrierfrequenz ~1:25 in Europaeern. Trotz hoher MAF eindeutig pathogen — MAF-Filter-Falle bei rezessiven Erkrankungen beachten!
explanation_en: Most common CF variant worldwide (~70% of CF alleles). MAF 1.2% fits AR disease with carrier frequency ~1:25 in Europeans. Despite high MAF clearly pathogenic — beware of MAF filter trap in recessive diseases!

functional_result: Truncated protein, loss of BRCT domain, no DNA repair activity
explanation_de: Frameshift-Mutation fuehrt zu trunkiertem Protein ohne BRCT-Domaene. PVS1 anwendbar (LOF-Mechanismus bei BRCA1 etabliert). Ashkenazi-Foundermutation (5382insC).
explanation_en: Frameshift mutation produces truncated protein lacking BRCT domain. PVS1 applicable (LOF mechanism established for BRCA1). Ashkenazi founder mutation (5382insC).

functional_result: <1% residual MCAD enzyme activity, defective protein folding
explanation_de: ACHTUNG: MAF 1.4% — wuerde durch Standard-MAF-Filter <1% herausfallen! Trotzdem pathogen. ~80% aller MCADD-Allele in Nordeuropa. Carrier-Frequenz ~1:50. PM2 NICHT anwendbar wegen hoher MAF.
explanation_en: WARNING: MAF 1.4% — would be filtered out by standard MAF filter <1%! Still pathogenic. ~80% of all MCADD alleles in Northern Europe. Carrier frequency ~1:50. PM2 NOT applicable due to high MAF.

explanation_de: Nonsense-Variante in DMD (X-linked), PVS1 anwendbar da LOF der etablierte Krankheitsmechanismus ist. Absent in gnomAD. NMD wird erwartet.
explanation_en: Nonsense variant in DMD (X-linked), PVS1 applicable as LOF is the established disease mechanism. Absent in gnomAD. NMD expected.

functional_result: <5% residual glucocerebrosidase activity
explanation_de: Haeufige Gaucher-Variante (frueher L444P). Schwerer Phaenotyp (Typ 2/3) bei Homozygotie. Funktionelle Daten zeigen massiv reduzierte Enzymaktivitaet.
explanation_en: Common Gaucher variant (formerly L444P). Severe phenotype (type 2/3) when homozygous. Functional data show massively reduced enzyme activity.

explanation_de: Kanonische Splice-Donor-Variante (+1 Position). PVS1 anwendbar. Absent in gnomAD. PKD1 hat etablierten LOF-Mechanismus fuer ADPKD.
explanation_en: Canonical splice donor variant (+1 position). PVS1 applicable. Absent in gnomAD. PKD1 has established LOF mechanism for ADPKD.

functional_result: 0% hexosaminidase A activity
explanation_de: Ashkenazi-Foundermutation fuer Tay-Sachs-Erkrankung. Frameshift fuehrt zu komplettem Funktionsverlust. PVS1 + PS3 reichen bereits fuer pathogen.
explanation_en: Ashkenazi founder mutation for Tay-Sachs disease. Frameshift leads to complete loss of function. PVS1 + PS3 already sufficient for pathogenic.

functional_result: ~20% residual LDL receptor binding activity
explanation_de: Pathogene LDLR-Variante in funktionell kritischer Ligandenbindungsdomaene. AD-Vererbung, PM1 anwendbar (Hotspot). Reduzierte LDL-Rezeptorbindung in vitro bestaetigt.
explanation_en: Pathogenic LDLR variant in functionally critical ligand-binding domain. AD inheritance, PM1 applicable (hotspot). Reduced LDL receptor binding confirmed in vitro.

functional_result: Dominant-negative effect, loss of DNA binding, GOF in transactivation assays
explanation_de: Hotspot-Variante in TP53 DNA-Bindungsdomaene. R248Q ist eine der haeufigsten somatischen und Keimbahn-TP53-Mutationen (Li-Fraumeni). Dominant-negativer Effekt nachgewiesen.
explanation_en: Hotspot variant in TP53 DNA binding domain. R248Q is one of the most common somatic and germline TP53 mutations (Li-Fraumeni). Dominant-negative effect demonstrated.

explanation_de: Frameshift in MYBPC3, LOF ist etablierter Mechanismus fuer HCM. PVS1 anwendbar. Fehlen funktioneller Studien verhindert volle pathogen-Klassifikation.
explanation_en: Frameshift in MYBPC3, LOF is established mechanism for HCM. PVS1 applicable. Lack of functional studies prevents full pathogenic classification.

explanation_de: SCN5A-Variante in der Pore-Region des Natriumkanals (Hotspot fuer Brugada/LQT3). Rare, in silico pathogen, aber keine funktionellen Daten. LP aufgrund PM1+PM2+PP3.
explanation_en: SCN5A variant in sodium channel pore region (hotspot for Brugada/LQT3). Rare, in silico pathogenic, but no functional data. LP based on PM1+PM2+PP3.

explanation_de: Kanonische Splice-Donor-Variante in RB1. PVS1 anwendbar (Tumorsuppressor, LOF-Mechanismus). Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2 = likely pathogenic.
explanation_en: Canonical splice donor variant in RB1. PVS1 applicable (tumor suppressor, LOF mechanism). Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2 = likely pathogenic.

functional_result: Altered contractile dynamics in cardiomyocyte model, increased Ca2+ sensitivity
explanation_de: MYH7-Variante im Konverterbereich (funktioneller Hotspot fuer HCM). Funktionelle Studie zeigt veraenderte Kontraktionsdynamik, aber methodische Limitationen. PM5: andere pathogene Variante an gleicher Position bekannt.
explanation_en: MYH7 variant in converter domain (functional hotspot for HCM). Functional study shows altered contractile dynamics but with methodological limitations. PM5: other pathogenic variant known at same position.

explanation_de: Glycin-Substitution in COL1A1 Triple-Helix-Domaene. Glycin-Substitutionen in Kollagen-Triple-Helix sind der klassische OI-Mechanismus (PM1). PM5: andere Gly>Xxx an dieser Position als pathogen klassifiziert.
explanation_en: Glycine substitution in COL1A1 triple helix domain. Glycine substitutions in collagen triple helix are the classic OI mechanism (PM1). PM5: other Gly>Xxx at this position classified as pathogenic.

explanation_de: KCNQ1-Variante in S5-Segment des Kaliumkanals (Hotspot fuer LQT1). PM5: R273H an gleicher Stelle als pathogen etabliert. Keine eigenen funktionellen Daten.
explanation_en: KCNQ1 variant in S5 segment of potassium channel (hotspot for LQT1). PM5: R273H at same position established as pathogenic. No dedicated functional data.

explanation_de: Nonsense in TSC1, LOF ist etablierter Mechanismus. NMD erwartet. Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2 = LP.
explanation_en: Nonsense in TSC1, LOF is established mechanism. NMD expected. Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2 = LP.

explanation_de: SMAD4 MH2-Domaene, kritisch fuer TGF-beta-Signaltransduktion. Mehrere pathogene Varianten an benachbarten Positionen bekannt (JP/HHT). PM5 anwendbar.
explanation_en: SMAD4 MH2 domain, critical for TGF-beta signal transduction. Multiple pathogenic variants at adjacent positions known (JP/HHT). PM5 applicable.

explanation_de: Nonsense in NF2 (Tumorsuppressor). LOF etabliert fuer Neurofibromatose Typ 2. PVS1 anwendbar, absent in gnomAD.
explanation_en: Nonsense in NF2 (tumor suppressor). LOF established for neurofibromatosis type 2. PVS1 applicable, absent in gnomAD.

explanation_de: Frameshift in PTCH1. LOF etabliert fuer Gorlin-Syndrom. Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2.
explanation_en: Frameshift in PTCH1. LOF established for Gorlin syndrome. Absent in gnomAD. PVS1 + PM2.

explanation_de: RYR1-Variante in MH/CCD-Hotspot-Region. In silico pathogen, aber RYR1 ist ein riesiges Gen mit vielen seltenen Missense-Varianten. Ohne Cosegregation oder funktionelle Daten bleibt es VUS.
explanation_en: RYR1 variant in MH/CCD hotspot region. In silico pathogenic, but RYR1 is a huge gene with many rare missense variants. Without cosegregation or functional data it remains VUS.

explanation_de: SCN1A-Missense, rare, in silico moderat pathogen. SCN1A hat sowohl GOF- als auch LOF-Mechanismen (Epilepsie vs. FHM). Ohne klaren Phaenotyp-Match und funktionelle Daten VUS. REVEL 0.62 liegt im Graubereich.
explanation_en: SCN1A missense, rare, in silico moderately pathogenic. SCN1A has both GOF and LOF mechanisms (epilepsy vs FHM). Without clear phenotype match and functional data, VUS. REVEL 0.62 is in the gray zone.

explanation_de: KCNH2-Variante im C-Terminus, nicht im Pore/S4-Hotspot. REVEL 0.55 ist borderline. MAF 0.04% — niedrig, aber nicht absent. Typisches VUS-Dilemma bei Arrhythmie-Genen.
explanation_en: KCNH2 variant in C-terminus, not in pore/S4 hotspot. REVEL 0.55 is borderline. MAF 0.04% — low but not absent. Typical VUS dilemma in arrhythmia genes.

explanation_de: LMNA hat extrem pleiotropes Spektrum (DCM, EDMD, FPLD, progeroide Syndrome). R335W liegt in der Coil-2-Domaene. Ohne Phaenotyp-Spezifitaet und Cosegregation VUS.
explanation_en: LMNA has extremely pleiotropic spectrum (DCM, EDMD, FPLD, progeroid syndromes). R335W is in coil-2 domain. Without phenotype specificity and cosegregation, VUS.

explanation_de: Position +3 ist NICHT kanonisch (nicht +1/+2). SpliceAI zeigt moderaten Score. PVS1 NICHT anwendbar bei nicht-kanonischen Splice-Varianten. RNA-Studie noetig um Splice-Effekt zu bestaetigen. Haeufiger Fehler: PVS1 bei +3 anwenden.
explanation_en: Position +3 is NOT canonical (not +1/+2). SpliceAI shows moderate score. PVS1 NOT applicable for non-canonical splice variants. RNA study needed to confirm splice effect. Common mistake: applying PVS1 at +3.

explanation_de: TTN-Missense sind extrem haeufig in der Bevoelkerung und fast nie pathogen. Nur TTN-Trunkierungen (TTNtv) sind klar mit DCM assoziiert. BP1 anwendbar (Missense in Gen wo LOF der Mechanismus ist). Tendenz zu LB.
explanation_en: TTN missense variants are extremely common in the population and almost never pathogenic. Only TTN truncating variants (TTNtv) are clearly associated with DCM. BP1 applicable (missense in gene where LOF is mechanism). Tends toward LB.

explanation_de: VHL-Variante in der Elongin-C-Bindungsdomaene. VHL hat sowohl LOF (RCC, Pheo) als auch spezifische Missense-Phaenotypen (Polyzythaemie). Ohne Phaenotyp und Cosegregation VUS.
explanation_en: VHL variant in Elongin C binding domain. VHL has both LOF (RCC, pheo) and specific missense phenotypes (polycythemia). Without phenotype and cosegregation, VUS.

explanation_de: FBN1-Variante AUSSERHALB der Gly-Substitutions-Hotspots. Nicht alle FBN1-Missense verursachen Marfan — viele sind benigne. REVEL 0.61 borderline. Ohne Cosegregation klar VUS.
explanation_en: FBN1 variant OUTSIDE glycine substitution hotspots. Not all FBN1 missense cause Marfan — many are benign. REVEL 0.61 borderline. Without cosegregation clearly VUS.

functional_result: Normal HDR activity in functional assay (85% of wildtype)
explanation_de: Funktionelle Studie zeigt nahezu normale HDR-Aktivitaet — spricht gegen Pathogenitaet. Aber BRCA2-Missense im DNA-Bindungsbereich, rare. BS3 und PM2 heben sich auf. Leaning benign, aber formal VUS.
explanation_en: Functional study shows near-normal HDR activity — argues against pathogenicity. But BRCA2 missense in DNA binding region, rare. BS3 and PM2 cancel out. Leaning benign, but formally VUS.

explanation_de: PTEN R130 ist in der Phosphatase-Domaene. R130G und R130L sind pathogen, aber R130C nicht ausreichend charakterisiert. PM5 koennte argumentiert werden, aber mit Vorsicht.
explanation_en: PTEN R130 is in phosphatase domain. R130G and R130L are pathogenic, but R130C not sufficiently characterized. PM5 could be argued but with caution.

functional_result: Mildly reduced gap junction coupling in Xenopus oocytes
explanation_de: Kontroverse Variante! MAF 1.8% ist hoch, aber unter BA1 (5%). Funktionell mild reduziert. Moeglicherweise hypomorphes Allel, das nur compound-heterozygot mit schwerem Allel zu mildem Hoerverlust fuehrt. Das perfekte VUS-Beispiel.
explanation_en: Controversial variant! MAF 1.8% is high but below BA1 (5%). Functionally mildly reduced. Possibly hypomorphic allele causing mild hearing loss only when compound het with severe allele. The perfect VUS example.

functional_result: 50% reduced glycosylase activity, incomplete repair of 8-oxo-G:A
explanation_de: MUTYH G396D: Haeufiger als typische pathogene Varianten. 50% Restaktivitaet — ist das genug fuer Krankheit? Bei AR Vererbung koennte es als mildes Allel wirken. MAF grenzwertig hoch.
explanation_en: MUTYH G396D: More common than typical pathogenic variants. 50% residual activity — is that enough for disease? In AR inheritance could act as mild allele. MAF borderline high.

explanation_de: KCNQ1-Variante im C-terminalen Bereich, nicht in Transmembrandomaene. C-terminale Missense sind weniger oft pathogen. Ohne Cosegregation und funktionelle Daten VUS.
explanation_en: KCNQ1 variant in C-terminal region, not in transmembrane domain. C-terminal missense less often pathogenic. Without cosegregation and functional data, VUS.

explanation_de: CACNA1A assoziiert mit EA2, FHM1, SCA6. Verschiedene Mechanismen (LOF fuer EA2, GOF fuer FHM1). Glycin-zu-Arginin ist drastisch, aber ohne Phaenotyp-Korrelation VUS.
explanation_en: CACNA1A associated with EA2, FHM1, SCA6. Different mechanisms (LOF for EA2, GOF for FHM1). Glycine-to-arginine is drastic, but without phenotype correlation, VUS.

functional_result: Creates poly-A tract prone to somatic frameshift, OR=1.5-2.0 for CRC
explanation_de: APC I1307K: Kein klassisch pathogenes Allel, sondern Risikoallel (OR ~1.5-2.0). Haeufig in Ashkenazi (6%). Schafft somatische Instabilitaet. ACMG-Framework greift hier schlecht — Risikoallele passen nicht in P/LP/VUS/LB/B-Schema.
explanation_en: APC I1307K: Not a classic pathogenic allele but a risk allele (OR ~1.5-2.0). Common in Ashkenazi (6%). Creates somatic instability. ACMG framework fits poorly here — risk alleles don't map well to P/LP/VUS/LB/B schema.

functional_result: Partially reduced kinase activity, OR=1.4 for breast cancer
explanation_de: CHEK2 I157T: Risikoallel (OR ~1.4), keine monogene Pathogenitaet. MAF 1.8% zu hoch fuer pathogene Variante. BS1 anwendbar. Funktionell nur partiell reduziert.
explanation_en: CHEK2 I157T: Risk allele (OR ~1.4), no monogenic pathogenicity. MAF 1.8% too high for pathogenic variant. BS1 applicable. Functionally only partially reduced.

functional_result: Normal HDR function, normal protein stability
explanation_de: BRCA2 V2466A: MAF 2.5% in Europaeern, funktionell normal, in silico benigne. Gutes Beispiel fuer Reklassifikation von VUS zu LB.
explanation_en: BRCA2 V2466A: MAF 2.5% in Europeans, functionally normal, in silico benign. Good example of VUS reclassification to LB.

explanation_de: MYH7-Variante mit MAF 0.3% — fuer HCM-verursachende Variante zu hoch (erwartete Praevalenz 1:500). BS1 anwendbar.
explanation_en: MYH7 variant with MAF 0.3% — too high for HCM-causing variant (expected prevalence 1:500). BS1 applicable.

explanation_de: Synonyme Variante in KCNH2. Kein Splice-Effekt vorhergesagt (SpliceAI <0.1). BP7 anwendbar.
explanation_en: Synonymous variant in KCNH2. No splice effect predicted (SpliceAI <0.1). BP7 applicable.

explanation_de: Synonyme LDLR-Variante, MAF 0.8%. Kein Splice-Effekt. Obwohl LDLR-Varianten klinisch relevant sein koennen, sind synonyme Varianten ohne Splice-Effekt benigne.
explanation_en: Synonymous LDLR variant, MAF 0.8%. No splice effect. Although LDLR variants can be clinically relevant, synonymous variants without splice effect are benign.

explanation_de: Tiefe intronische Variante in PKD1. MAF 4.8% — viel zu haeufig fuer pathogene ADPKD-Variante. SpliceAI negativ.
explanation_en: Deep intronic variant in PKD1. MAF 4.8% — far too common for pathogenic ADPKD variant. SpliceAI negative.

explanation_de: NF1 intronische Variante. MAF 3.4%. Position -5 ist nicht kanonisch, SpliceAI negativ.
explanation_en: NF1 intronic variant. MAF 3.4%. Position -5 is not canonical, SpliceAI negative.

explanation_de: Tiefe intronische Variante, MAF 7.1%. Ueberschreitet BA1-Schwellenwert. Kein Splice-Effekt. Tendenz zu Benign.
explanation_en: Deep intronic variant, MAF 7.1%. Exceeds BA1 threshold. No splice effect. Trending toward Benign.

functional_result: Normal sodium current kinetics in HEK293 cells
explanation_de: SCN5A R1193Q: MAF 0.9%, funktionell normal, in silico eher benigne.
explanation_en: SCN5A R1193Q: MAF 0.9%, functionally normal, in silico rather benign.

explanation_de: MAF 6.3% ueberschreitet BA1-Schwellenwert (5%) — Standalone-Kriterium fuer benigne. Keine weitere Evidenz noetig.
explanation_en: MAF 6.3% exceeds BA1 threshold (5%) — standalone criterion for benign. No further evidence needed.

functional_result: Mildly reduced iron regulation, OR=0.5-2.0 for iron overload (context-dependent)
explanation_de: HFE H63D: MAF 14% — weit ueber BA1. Klinisch meist irrelevant. Als Einzelbefund benigne.
explanation_en: HFE H63D: MAF 14% — well above BA1. Clinically usually irrelevant. As isolated finding, benign.

functional_result: Thermolabile enzyme, 50-60% reduced activity at 37C
explanation_de: MTHFR C677T: MAF 33%! Trotz reduzierter Enzymaktivitaet keine monogene Erkrankung. BA1 greift eindeutig. Wird oft faelschlich als klinisch relevant angegeben.
explanation_en: MTHFR C677T: MAF 33%! Despite reduced enzyme activity, no monogenic disease. BA1 clearly applies. Often incorrectly reported as clinically relevant.

functional_result: Normal transcriptional activity, slight difference in apoptosis induction rate
explanation_de: TP53 P72R: Hochfrequenter Polymorphismus. Trotz Lage in TP53 keine pathogene Variante. BA1 eindeutig. Nicht jede TP53-Variante ist pathogen!
explanation_en: TP53 P72R: High-frequency polymorphism. Despite location in TP53, not a pathogenic variant. BA1 clear. Not every TP53 variant is pathogenic!

functional_result: Altered lipoprotein binding, APOE4 isoform associated with AD risk (OR ~3-15 per allele)
explanation_de: APOE4-Allel: MAF 8%. Starker Risikofaktor fuer Alzheimer (OR 3-15), aber kein monogenes Allel. BA1 greift. Perfektes Beispiel fuer Grenzen des ACMG-Frameworks bei Risikoallelen.
explanation_en: APOE4 allele: MAF 8%. Strong risk factor for Alzheimer (OR 3-15) but not a monogenic allele. BA1 applies. Perfect example of ACMG framework limitations for risk alleles.

functional_result: Normal ATM kinase activity, normal DNA damage response
explanation_de: ATM D1853N: MAF 15%. Historisch als Risikoallel diskutiert, aber funktionell normal und zu haeufig. BA1 greift.
explanation_en: ATM D1853N: MAF 15%. Historically discussed as risk allele but functionally normal and too common. BA1 applies.
